/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/runtime.dir/c/runtime.cu.o CMakeFiles/runtime.dir/usr/src/tensorrt/samples/common/logger.cpp.o -o runtime   -L/usr/local/cuda-10.2/targets/aarch64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda-10.2/targets/aarch64-linux/lib  /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libnvinfer.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libnvinfer_plugin.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libnvparsers.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libnvonnxparser.so -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
